if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND t.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND t.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbDeviceToken :: selectById */ t.* , mem.member_nm AS member_nm FROM mb_device_token t LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = t.member_id WHERE t.device_token_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbDeviceToken :: selectList */ t.* , mem.member_nm AS member_nm FROM mb_device_token t LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = t.member_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbDeviceToken :: selectPageList */ t.* , mem.member_nm AS member_nm FROM mb_device_token t LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = t.member_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(t.*) /* base.ec.mb :: MbDeviceToken :: selectPageCount */ FROM mb_device_token t
